def positive_print_metrics_instead_of_logging():
    rule_id = "print_metrics_instead_of_logging"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Training or evaluation code prints metrics directly instead of using logging or experiment tracking."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
